instruction:
The volume of the solid of revolution obtained by rotating the figure enclosed by the parabola \( y^2 = 4ax \) and the line \( x = x_0 \) (where \( x_0 > 0 \)) around the x-axis is \( = \).

Options:
A. \(\frac{6}{3} a^2\)
B. \(\frac{12}{3} a^2\)
C. \( rac{32}{3} a^2\)
D. \(\frac{8}{3} a^2\)
E. \(\frac{14}{3} a^2\)
F. \( rac{16}{3} a^2\)
G. \(\frac{9}{3} a^2\)
H. \(\frac{10}{3} a^2\)
I. \(\frac{7}{3} a^2\)
J. \( rac{4}{3} a^2\)
